name: Nicotinamide riboside does not alter mitochondrial respiration, content or morphology in skeletal muscle from obese and insulin-resistant men
short_name: NR obese-men muscle mitochondria null trial
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial testing high-dose nicotinamide riboside in middle-aged obese insulin-resistant men, with skeletal-muscle mitochondrial respiration, content, morphology, and NAD-metabolite endpoints.
